_meta.what: LearnLoop canonical facts. Machine-readable single source of truth for the GTM AI Workshop fiction.
_meta.rule: Every number and name in every asset must match this file. Where any other document disagrees, this file wins.

company.name: LearnLoop
company.tagline: Close the loop between learning and doing.
company.one_liner: B2B learning platform for the mid-market: proves the skill landed, not just that the training was completed.

metrics.customers_note: Sales-led, mid-market (200-2,000 employees). Free-trial signups are product-led, mostly individual users and small teams, and are NOT counted in the 750.

modules.Learn: The LMS: courses, learning paths, compliance tracking, mobile.
modules.Loop: The skills engine: maps who can actually do what, flags gaps, prescribes the learning that closes them. The moat.
modules.Market: 8,000+ courses from external providers, bought and administered in one place.

product.pricing_model: Per-seat per year; Learn-only or Learn+Loop bundle; Market usage-based on top.

markets.beachhead: DACH via Berlin office; 9 customers won through warm network (founder intros, references, feet on the ground)
markets.dach_beachhead_note: The other 5 beachhead customers are unnamed; do not invent additional named DACH customers.

icp.company_profile: 200-2,000 employees, mid-market, in transformation (scaling, reorg, compliance pressure, or skills shortage)

blocker.wants: integration, data security, no new risk
blocker.fears: shadow tools, SSO/compliance gaps, employee-monitoring concerns (DE)

SkillForge.line: Built for the org chart of 2010

Traida.archetype: HR suite with a bolt-on LMS

content.editing_model: hand-editing by whoever holds the voice; does not scale
